title: Easy Sacks Compat
description: Supplementaries Sacks and Easy Shulker Boxes Compat
body:
This datapack allows sacks added by the mods [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared), to become compatible with the [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) mod.

If you need this compat for an older version of Minecraft, checkout [EasyShulkerBoxes Supplementaries Sacks Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easyshulkerboxes-supplementaries-compat).
